subtitle: Set goals and reclaim your time

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Shows today's screen time vs daily goal as a progress ring (green when under, red when over), category breakdown mini-donut, current streak badge, and a quick-add FAB. Top stat cards show today total, weekly average, and goal adherence rate.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick logging modal. Duration stepper in 5-minute increments with preset buttons (15m, 30m, 1h, 2h). Category picker with icons. Toggle for intentional vs mindless usage. Optional app name text field and device picker.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap where each day is colored by how close to goal (green = under, yellow = near limit, red = over). Tapping a day shows detailed breakdown. Below the calendar, a date-grouped list of all entries with category icons, durations, and intentional badges. Filter by category or device.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: (1) 7-day bar chart of daily totals with goal line overlay, (2) category distribution pie/donut chart, (3) intentional vs mindless usage ratio trend, (4) week-over-week comparison card, (5) best streak and personal records, (6) AI-style insight cards highlighting patterns like peak usage times and improving/worsening categories.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalFormatted
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's total formatted as 'Xh Ym' (e.g. '3h 25m')

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of todayTotalMinutes to dailyGoalMinutes, capped at 0...2 for display. Under 1.0 = under goal.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayRemainingMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Max(0, dailyGoalMinutes - todayTotalMinutes). Shows how much budget is left today.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCategoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (category, totalMinutes) tuples for today, sorted descending by minutes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayIntentionalRatio
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of today's total minutes that were marked as intentional (0.0-1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily screen time over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total screen time for the current calendar week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily screen time for the 7 days before the current week, used for week-over-week comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (currentWeekAvg - prevWeekAvg) / prevWeekAvg. Negative = improvement (less screen time).

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of consecutive days (ending today or yesterday) where total screen time was at or under the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest streak of days at or under the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Over the last 30 days, percentage of days where total was at or under goal (0.0-1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: last7DaysChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, totalMinutes) for the last 7 days, used for the bar chart with goal line overlay

viewModelComputedProperties.name: overallCategoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Category percentages across all entries in the last 30 days for the donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: intentionalRatioTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily intentional-use ratio over the last 14 days, showing whether mindful usage is improving

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topAppsByTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 app names by total minutes in the last 7 days (only entries with appName filled)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakUsageHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) when the most screen time is logged, based on entry timestamps over last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day with the lowest total screen time in the last 30 days (date, minutes)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: worstDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day with the highest total screen time in the last 30 days (date, minutes)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 2-4 dynamically generated natural-language insight strings based on current data patterns

dailyGoal.description: User-configurable daily screen time limit in minutes. Stored in UserDefaults. The progress ring turns green when under goal, yellow at 80-100%, and red when exceeded. Default is a moderate 240 minutes (4 hours), which aligns with wellness research suggesting <4h non-work screen time is healthy.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the total screen time logged is less than or equal to the daily goal. Days with zero entries are NOT counted (they break the streak, encouraging consistent logging). The streak resets if yesterday exceeded the goal.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: 7-day rolling average compared to previous 7-day rolling average, shown as percentage change (negative = less screen time = good). Secondary trends: (1) intentional usage ratio week-over-week — is the user becoming more mindful? (2) Category shift detection — flag if any category increased by >25% week-over-week. (3) Weekend vs weekday comparison — most users have different patterns.
insights: Goal adherence summary: 'You stayed under your goal X of the last 7 days'
Category alert: 'Social media usage increased 35% this week — your biggest change'
Intentional usage trend: 'Your intentional usage ratio improved from 45% to 68% this week'
Streak motivation: 'You're on a X-day streak! Your longest is Y days.'
Best day recognition: 'Tuesday was your best day this week at only 2h 15m'
Week-over-week: 'Your daily average dropped 22 minutes compared to last week'
Peak time awareness: 'Most of your screen time happens between 8-10 PM — consider a wind-down routine'
Device breakdown: 'Phone accounts for 72% of your screen time — try shifting to computer for intentional tasks'
Category ratio: '60% of your time goes to entertainment — consider swapping 30 min for education'
